name: ai-marketplace
description: Curated collection of AI tools, skills, and agents for PyTorch development workflows across the ecosystem

plugins.name: torch-compile
plugins.description: PyTorch torch.compile debugging tools and workflow automation

plugins.name: ai-writer
plugins.description: Tools for creating and managing Claude Code plugins, skills, and agents

plugins.name: deterministic-hook
plugins.description: Deterministic hook system for automatic skill activation and guardrails with skill-developer documentation

plugins.name: vllm-compile
plugins.description: Expert guidance for vLLM's custom compiler - @support_torch_compile decorator, vllmBackend/Inductor passes, PiecewiseBackend graph splitting, and CudaGraphWrapper CUDA graph management

plugins.name: vllm-test-audit
plugins.description: Two-phase test oracle auditor for vLLM. Phase 1 (audit-pr) scopes to PR/directory, runs candidate finder, produces structured evidence. Phase 2 (test-audit-review) independently classifies via decision tree.

plugins.name: ci-runner-demo
plugins.description: Demo plugin for validating Claude Code plugin infrastructure in CI. Tests hook execution, script invocation, and skill loading.

plugins.name: pytorch-test-refactor
plugins.description: Refactor PyTorch test files to be device-agnostic with hardware classification (GENERIC/DEVICE_GENERIC/DEVICE_SPECIFIC/MULTI_DEVICE). Guides analysis, classification, class splitting, and verification.

plugins.name: torchtalk
plugins.description: MCP server for conversational PyTorch codebase analysis: trace Python->C++->CUDA binding chains, impact analysis, dispatch mapping, call-graph visualization, and test discovery across the PyTorch source.

plugins.name: test-generation
plugins.description: Generic test generation for any framework with automated impact analysis. Supports PyTorch, vLLM, TensorFlow, and custom frameworks with JIRA, GitHub, and GitLab integration.
